nasb.text: These are the sons of Benjamin according to their families; and those who were numbered of them were 45,600.

esv.text: These are the sons of Benjamin according to their clans, and those listed were 45,600.

cnv.text: 這些就是便雅憫的子孫，按著他們的家族，他們被數點的，共有四萬五千六百人。

ccb.text: 这些是便雅悯各宗族，共登记了四万五千六百人。
